title: Name resolution problem in sub-selects within triggers
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE b_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES a_table(id));
CREATE TRIGGER after_insert_a AFTER INSERT ON a_table FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO b_table(ref_id) SELECT id FROM a_table WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT a.id, a.value, b.ref_id FROM a_table a LEFT JOIN b_table b ON a.id = b.ref_id;
key_bug_features: Name resolution failure in trigger sub-selects
